E2
programme.desc: 以美食公司為背景，通過王大蔚等七名角色的職場成長線與三對CP的情感線，展現年輕人工作與生活的酸甜苦辣；劇情採用「貪吃蛇」結構來觀眾展現了7名主角的內心世界，搭配美食隱喻與事件反轉，展現角色互幫互助完成大型直播活動的過程。

programme.title: E13 - 魔丸額王安宇整蠱沈騰
programme.desc: 出發團老成員沈騰、白敬亭、金晨、賈冰、胡先煦、王安宇、范丞丞攜手再次奔赴自然秘境，沉浸式領略各地的美麗風景；以「金木水火土」為主題線索，踏上野外探險之旅，將旅行與挑戰深度綁定，足跡從西藏林芝、齊齊哈爾等國內秘境延伸至海外極端環境。

programme.title: E6 - 楊潤澤淘汰危機蘇有朋捏把汗
programme.desc: 突破傳統音樂綜藝節目模式，創新性地將舞台設立在郵輪上，從中國上海啟航，途經沖繩、越南、新加坡、馬來西亞，最終抵達香港；吸納數百名來自亞洲各國的00後新銳唱將，他們將在Jessie J、張靚穎、張信哲、尤長靖所組成的「新聲團」，及近百位亞洲各國音樂人的見證下，開啟一次巡迴亞洲的音樂競演！

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: 以美食公司為背景，通過王大蔚等七名角色的職場成長線與三對CP的情感線，展現年輕人工作與生活的酸甜苦辣；劇情採用「貪吃蛇」結構來觀眾展現了7名主角的內心世界，搭配美食隱喻與事件反轉，展現角色互幫互助完成大型直播活動的過程。

programme.title: E6 - 港男陷追愛火葬場
programme.desc: 熟齡戀愛旅居真人秀，10位性格各異、魅力全開的50+熟齡男女，帶著一顆敢愛的心，從大理到泰國，在日落時分開啟一段愛情之旅，一同打破恐老焦慮，傳遞歲月從不敗熱愛的生活態度。

programme.title: E6 - 舊愛vs新歡？
programme.desc: 以「尋找勢均力敵的參與者」為核心模式，通過團隊協作任務獲取生存物資，個人競技爭奪約會權，並設置淘汰機制與心動投票綁定規則；素人嘉賓們將逃離都市，直面愛情與生存的挑戰，在人群中尋找勢均力敵的彼此。

programme.title: E14 - Dig
programme.desc: Stanley helps Fifi and Fred dig up some shiny stones in their garden that turn out to be old bits of mosaic. With the help of Cynthia and Hettie, they put the pieces back together.

programme.title: E24 - It's Time To Make A Family Tree
programme.desc: Great-Gran Gran shows JoJo an old family photo - it's fun spotting Gran Gran, Mummy and Great-Gran Gran when they were younger. JoJo recognises some people, but there are lots of members of her family that she's never met before.

programme.title: E23 - Family Meeting
programme.desc: When Dad's accused of fluffing in Bluey's face as he climbed out of bed, he's put on trial with Mum as the judge, and Bluey and Bingo as witnesses. Bluey might also have to explain what she was doing there.

programme.title: E24 - Faceytalk
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo love to video chat with Muffin and Socks so they can all draw pictures together. When Muffin won't give Socks a turn, the kids discover what happens when you hog.

programme.title: E25 - Ragdoll
programme.desc: Dad agrees to take Bluey and Bingo to the shops to buy an ice-cream if they can get him into the car. Only problem is... he's just entered 'Ragdoll' mode!

programme.title: E29 - The Harvest Badge
programme.desc: Duggee is getting ready to harvest the ripe crops that grown. The squirrels remember when they planted their seeds, watered them, and left them to grow, and now it's time to help Duggee pick them all.

programme.title: E28 - The Space Badge
programme.desc: Duggee teaches the squirrels all about the stars, the planets and the Milky Way!

programme.desc: Betty recalls the first time she pushed the red button, the Squirrels explore a range of emotions with Happy, Angry Bull tells a not-so-sleepy bedtime story, and the gerbils sing.

programme.desc: It's a space race as Supertato helps Carrot fly her baguette rocket to be the first Veggie on the Cheese Moon but half way there Evil Pea crashes into them making them crash land.

programme.title: E7 - Song Of Peace
programme.desc: Betty recalls the first time she pushed the red button, the Squirrels explore a range of emotions with Happy, Angry Bull tells a not-so-sleepy bedtime story, and the gerbils sing.

programme.title: E2 - Speedy Pea
programme.desc: Evil Pea steals Supertato's brand new Tato Car but doesn't realise that the Grape Kids are in the back seat. Supertato has to get the Grape Kids back to safety and save his car.

programme.title: E1 - The Carrot Badge

programme.title: E14 - Perfect
programme.desc: For her Father's Day card, Bluey sets out to draw a picture of herself and her father together. While recalling her favourite memories of playing with Bandit, Bluey struggles with the idea that her drawing must be perfect. Chilli tries to convince Bluey that perfection isn't easy, or absolutely necessary.

programme.title: E14 - Gills
programme.desc: Messy, a monster, explores science questions that children ask about the world around us. Messy wants to know how his goldfish friend can stay underwater for so long. He goes to OKIDO to find out.

programme.title: E2 - The Whistling Badge
programme.desc: When Egg, the cheeky little chick, goes on the run again, Duggee whistles to get him back. Hang on a minute Duggee, what was that noise? A whistle? The squirrels want to learn how to whistle.

programme.title: E1 - The Making Music Badge
programme.desc: When the Squirrels find Duggee playing the saxophone, they want to have a go too. Several pots, balloons, tins, tubes and some water later and the Squirrels are making music. And boy, are they LOUD!

programme.title: E14 - Dig
programme.desc: Stanley helps Fifi and Fred dig up some shiny stones in their garden that turn out to be old bits of mosaic. With the help of Cynthia and Hettie, they put the pieces back together.

programme.title: E24 - Faceytalk
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo love to video chat with Muffin and Socks so they can all draw pictures together. When Muffin won't give Socks a turn, the kids discover what happens when you hog.

programme.title: E25 - Ragdoll
programme.desc: Dad agrees to take Bluey and Bingo to the shops to buy an ice-cream if they can get him into the car. Only problem is... he's just entered 'Ragdoll' mode!

programme.title: E29 - The Harvest Badge
programme.desc: Duggee is getting ready to harvest the ripe crops that grown. The squirrels remember when they planted their seeds, watered them, and left them to grow, and now it's time to help Duggee pick them all.

programme.title: E18 - Carrot
programme.desc: Carrot sings about being trendy.

programme.title: E521
programme.desc: Foreigners who have left their familiar worlds behind and come to the unfamiliar land of Korea! A vivid, real-life adaptation story of foreigners trying to settle into Korean society for various reasons. This reality program warmly portrays their concerns about jobs, marriage, and parenting while living in Korea.

programme.desc: Romantic comedy about uniformed elite cadets chasing after their dreams.

programme.title: E44
programme.desc: A collection of outrageous problems that you have never heard of! A great 'knowledge talk show' where problematic children who are struggling and fighting in the emotional rooftop room gain true wisdom about life and the world.

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: Romantic comedy about uniformed elite cadets chasing after their dreams.

programme.title: E521
programme.desc: Foreigners who have left their familiar worlds behind and come to the unfamiliar land of Korea! programme.title: E13
programme.desc: In Onjeong Market, located in Onjeong, a town some distance away from Seoul, the area is buzzing with change as apartment complexes are built and plans for subway extensions and new town developments are announced. Across a single street stand a principled general hospital, Gongmyeongjeongdae Clinic, and traditional Korean clinic, Yangji Barun Clinic. The two families who run these places have been bitter enemies for years, bound by a long standing grudge from an incident in the past. Even the smallest matters turn into big fights, making them the most famous rival families in Onjeong. This is a family growth drama about these two families as they unravel their long held misunderstandings, heal their wounds, learn to love one another, and are reborn as one family.

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: A seemingly ordinary college girl finds herself reincarnated as a background extra in a romance novel, only to spend a night with the story's most dangerously obsessive male lead. A romantic fantasy with no brakes begins!

programme.title: E13
programme.desc: A meticulous and intense revenge chronicle in which two women return under false identities to uncover the truths and sins hidden within the Adel family.

programme.title: Inheritors
programme.desc: Inheritors is a multi-media product from CGTN that shines a light on China's rich Intangible Cultural Heritage. Each 30-minute TV edition is hosted by a long-term expatriate in China who has a unique understanding of the country's culture. He or she will introduce viewers to people who are dedicating their lives to its protection, inheritance, innovation, development and promotion.

programme.title: Inheritors
programme.desc: Inheritors is a multi-media product from CGTN that shines a light on China's rich Intangible Cultural Heritage. Each 30-minute TV edition is hosted by a long-term expatriate in China who has a unique understanding of the country's culture. He or she will introduce viewers to people who are dedicating their lives to its protection, inheritance, innovation, development and promotion.

programme.title: E4 - Siblings Month: Cody's New Sister!
programme.desc: Celebrate Siblings Month with Cody as he welcomes his new sister, Kendi! First, Cody finds out he's going to be a big brother & helps his family prepare. Then, he excitedly welcomes Kendi home & takes on the role of responsible big brother, helping her get to sleep. The sibling bonding continues as they play peek-a-boo, bounce balloons & make funny faces in the mirror. Watch as Cody learns to share & be the best big brother ever!

programme.title: E1 - Big Surprises on the Farm!
programme.desc: It's a day of big surprises at Lellobee City Farm! The adventure begins when Ella & Bee find a mysterious egg & have no idea who it belongs to. They become 'The Egg Detectives' & question all the birds, only to find out it's a tortoise egg! The surprises continue with the arrival of a brand new tractor & a visit from two very special guests: tiger twins who love to play hide-and-seek!

programme.title: E3 - Let's Sing, Dance and Play!
programme.desc: It's time to sing, dance & play at Lellobee City Farm! The fun starts in the Boogie Barn where Grandma Mei teaches Ella, Rishi & all the cute animals a brand new alphabet song. Then, it's time to get active as Mei leads a high-energy exercise dance for all the kids & animals! The day ends with a fun 'who can make the biggest splash?' competition in the inflatable swimming pool, where even Pablo the pig & Heidi the horse join in!

programme.title: E1 - A Super Special Day with Jill!
programme.desc: Join Jill for a super special day of friendship & discovery! First, she's at the playground with her friends when she notices a new girl is there all alone. Jill takes it upon herself to make friends with the girl & make her feel welcome. Then, while all of her friends know what their 'thing' is, Jill is unsure. She tries playing sports & dancing, but none of them stick. Eventually, she discovers that she's really good at arts & crafts & makes friendship bracelets for everyone!

programme.title: E1 - Big Surprises on the Farm!
programme.desc: It's a day of big surprises at Lellobee City Farm! The adventure begins when Ella & Bee find a mysterious egg & have no idea who it belongs to. They become 'The Egg Detectives' & question all the birds, only to find out it's a tortoise egg! The surprises continue with the arrival of a brand new tractor & a visit from two very special guests: tiger twins who love to play hide-and-seek!

programme.title: E3 - JJ's Splashin' Jungle Jams!
programme.desc: Get your dancing shoes ready for JJ's Splashin' Jungle Jams! The party starts at the beach with a fun game of freeze dance on the sand. Then, dive deep under the sea to learn the ABCs with jellyfish & shark friends & swim like a beautiful mermaid! The adventure continues deep in the jungle where you can dance with gorillas, snakes & crocodiles. From popping bubbles to doing a silly animal dance, it's a wild party at the beach & in the jungle!

programme.title: E12 - Siblings Month: Sharing is Caring!
programme.desc: JJ is learning that sharing is caring during Siblings Month! First, JJ, YoYo & TomTom show how much fun it is to share snacks & toys while playing at the park & at home. Then, the siblings team up for a game of baseball with animal friends, & TomTom & YoYo help JJ make a home run! The caring continues as they help find their lost dog Bingo, make rainbow popsicles together & build a gratitude family tree with photos.

programme.title: E7 - Siblings Month: Cooking & Fun!
programme.desc: Join the siblings for cooking & fun! First, the kids plan a surprise romantic dinner date for Mom & Dad! Then, they try putting ketchup on everything to see if it's yummy or yucky! The fun continues as they make a crazy bubble machine that gets a little out of control. From putting on a sock puppet show to navigating a life-size corn maze, it's a month of creative fun & sibling teamwork!

programme.title: Pistes Vertes:2025-2026
programme.desc: In Normandy, people from different backgrounds are committed to the environmental cause. They have one thing in common: they started by applying a few small ecological gestures in their daily lives before going further, until making it their profession.

programme.title: E16 - The Cursed Island
programme.desc: Yann and his little sister Marina live with their uncle Patrick, a famous oceanographer, on a Polynesian atoll. The two children meet Oum, a mysterious white dolphin who's always keen to help those he likes. Their friendship sees them exploring the ocean depths together.

programme.title: E4 - Conduct Unbecoming
programme.desc: Nadia and Maxime defend a police officer accused of causing the death of a man in custody. Claire sees an unexpected client arrive at the office: her mother. Chloe finds a friend present on the evening of her accident and whose testimony could change the course of her trial.

programme.title: Notre Dame De Moncton
programme.desc: Anna wants to rebuild ties with her son Jason, who she abandoned twenty years ago. But she runs off at the last minute and secretly takes refuge in an elderly couple's house. Unusual events lead to her forming a bond with the couple's wife...

programme.title: E4 - Mathieu Bassee At Studio Mtx/Chloe Valorso
programme.desc: Pissarro-Pontoise Art and History Museum displays the impressionist master's works. Mathieu Bassee and the team at Studio MTX are inspired by materials to embroider space. Miu Miu mixes genders and breaks codes. Sculptor and jewellery designer Chloe Valorso creates dreamlike objects inspired by animals, plants and minerals.

programme.title: E5 - The Berenty Dynasty
programme.desc: The pressure to find food reaches new heights and throws the reserve into turmoil. Witness fractures emerge within the ranks, dividing the gangs and leading Crystal, the indomitable leader of the Ruins gang, to face a challenge like none before.

programme.title: E1 - Trapped at Low Tide
programme.desc: Descend into the tide pool, where a hermit crab house hunts, a baby catshark runs into strange neighbours, and an octopus terrorises prey. Watch seagulls and other creatures hunt on the surface as the heat rises and oxygen depletes in the pool.

programme.title: E2 - Escape to the Deep
programme.desc: Count down the seconds as the sun sets and predators prowl around the pool before the tide finally rolls in. Persevere as night falls with a kleptomaniacal slug and an acrobatic scallop, while a pair of sneaky crabs take a dangerous shot at romance.

programme.title: E5 - A Bear’s Thanksgiving
programme.desc: Spy on the summer cubs as they learn to climb trees and forage for food in preparation for their release into the wild. Get surprised by a set of new arrivals, observe the annual pre-hibernation eating binge, and enjoy a bear-friendly Thanksgiving.

programme.title: E1 - The Power of Playtime
programme.desc: Explore the ways that animals use play, including young gibbons in Thailand that practice falling from branches, elderly macaques that preserve their brains with playtime, and games that sharpen the profound intelligence of African elephants.

programme.title: E1 - Mission Black Rhino
programme.desc: It’s a critical time for two black rhinos in Zambia. Four year old female Apson and fourteen year old bull Kango are at the core of a complex relocation mission that’s part of a grand plan to save a species.

programme.title: E3 - A Life Among Trees
programme.desc: How many trees can you find in the Amazon? And what’s it like to live up in them? Travel through the canopy and see how more than 1200 species of trees coexist. Plus, follow monkeys and other creatures who call these trees home.

programme.title: Never Say Die
programme.desc: Never Say Die follows Joey Delgado (Jillian Ward), a principled IT student who runs a vlog spotlighting the quiet heroism of honest police officers-inspired by her father, Major Julio Delgado (Raymart Santiago). Her views are challenged when a viral expose by Andrew Dizon (David Licauco), a sharp and cynical investigative vlogger, paints her father as corrupt and gets him suspended. The expose shatters the home she so carefully nurtured and blames Andrew.

programme.desc: Gives an up-to-the minute news here and around the world.

programme.title: E17
programme.desc: 多海是魔論製菓公司疲憊不堪的營銷團隊經理，她不知道自己還能忍受這種看似毫無希望的生活多久。就在這時，一心追求經濟利益的銷售部恩尚向她提出了投資加密貨幣的大膽建議。在經歷了無數次失敗後，加密貨幣成了恩尚最後的救命稻草，也是她扭轉人生的一線希望。會計部智松把花錢等同於幸福，出於害怕被拋在後面，她衝動地加入了他們。這場賭博很快變成了加密貨幣市場跌宕起伏的過山車之旅。當放棄歌唱事業、冉冉升起的公司董事咸志宇加入他們時，不可預測的混亂局面只會加深。這三個普通工人能否中大獎，一路飛向月球？

programme.title: E11
programme.desc: 講述在司法不公不義的社會中，地下秘密的士公司「彩虹運輸」存在著一位特殊部隊出身的代表的士司機替一群無法受到法律保護的被害者們找回公理。

programme.title: E23
programme.desc: 職業為遺傳基因研究員的韓素珍十分相信基因會默默指引人的命運及人生，更認為遺傳基因隱藏著尋找真愛的秘密。在一個平安夜韓素珍和男友分手，一個人失落並醉倒街頭，卻意外把生髮水倒在婦產科醫生沈延宇身上，展開一段命運般的戀情。

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: 女急救醫生杏野朱羅(松本若菜)有著出色的醫療技術，甚至能夠同時為兩名重症患者進行高難度手術，以致被稱為「阿修羅醫生」，她從不考慮醫院的利益，亦不會顧忌上級，只會專注拯救眼前的患者，即使對方身無分文又或者是黑道成員，都堅信要絕對幫助他們！

programme.desc: 職業為遺傳基因研究員的韓素珍十分相信基因會默默指引人的命運及人生，更認為遺傳基因隱藏著尋找真愛的秘密。在一個平安夜韓素珍和男友分手，一個人失落並醉倒街頭，卻意外把生髮水倒在婦產科醫生沈延宇身上，展開一段命運般的戀情。

programme.title: E4

programme.title: E4 - Ceylon Tea Trails, Sri Lanka
programme.desc: Monica and Rob travel to the highlands of central Sri Lanka to learn about Ceylon Tea Trails - a series of colonial era bungalows that have been renovated and revisioned by a local family of tea entrepreneurs. Monica works with the tea pickers and learns the importance of the industry to the country, while Rob tracks leopards in the surrounding plantations.

programme.title: Your Face Sounds Familiar[Live]
programme.desc: is a weekly musical variety show and reality competition where celebrities impersonate and perform as local and international music icons in front of a jury comprised of respected music icons Gary Valenciano, Ogie Alcasid, and Sharon Cuneta. The program airs on Saturdays and Sundays and is hosted by dance icons and noontime comedic duo, Vhong Navarro and Jhong Hilario.

programme.title: Juan Conversations With Rose Eclarinal S2
programme.desc: The show highlights the personal journeys, challenges and truimphs of ordinary and extraordinary overseas Filipinos. Produced and hosted by Rose Eclarinal

programme.title: It's Showtime (Sat)[Live]
programme.desc: The venue for Pinoys to strut and display their unique talents for all the world to see. Led by a powerhouse cast of popular celebrities - Vhong Navarro, Anne Curtis, Ogie Alcasid, Karylle, Jhong Hilario and Vice Ganda to name a few.

programme.title: 3Pol Trobol: Huli Ka Balbon![Live]
programme.desc: Apollo “Pol” Balbon, an aide-de‑camp, is framed for the murder of his boss, the Executive Director of the National Defense Agency. Forced to flee, he seeks the help of the director's daughter, Trina, even disguising himself in drag to gain her trust. Together, they uncover a conspiracy involving powerful corrupt officials while being pursued by law enforcement now under their control.

programme.title: The Amazing Maze
programme.desc: After Doki tells the story of Theseus and the labyrinth, Mundi boasts about her natural sense of direction. Gabi thinks Mundi relies on her ability to fly! To prove her skill, Mundi suggests they visit a hedge maze in Cumbria, England.

programme.title: Dramatic Landscapes
programme.desc: Phillipe visits Yellowstone National Park and Zion National Park in the United States. Then he travels to a Pacific island to explore some of the tallest sea cliffs in the world. He ends up in Canada.

programme.title: Circle of Life
programme.desc: Eric uses a hula hoop to explore nature and create a special research area teeming with life. Using the hoop helps him identify, count and keep track of the tiny creatures and plants he finds.

programme.title: Panda and Macaw
programme.desc: Posse, the red panda, and Santiago, the saki, have been having issues with their teeth and the dentist brought his big pliers! Ever heard the tale of how the blue-throated macaw parrot was saved from extinction and started a new fashion trend in the process?

programme.title: Fairy Tale Wedding
programme.desc: Doctor LeFrog teaches potions at Regal Academy, but Rose's mishaps lead to exploding potions. Vicky tricks Hawk into summoning a troll, who wants to woo princesses. Rose, Joy, Hawk, Astoria, and Travis team up to protect the academy's princesses from the gross troll.

programme.title: Monster Hunter
programme.desc: Media superstar 'Devil Daniels - Monster Hunter' is hunting a sea-creature he believes is a menace, but the Nektons want to protect.

programme.title: Tournaments
programme.desc: In the Middle Ages, tournaments are all the rage! When Howler's behavior is interpreted of that as a crazed fan, he unwittingly finds himself in the shoes of a knight, embarking on a wild joust!

programme.title: Big Dress Up
programme.desc: Ranger Loops gives the kids a box of old costumes, and while they're dressing up, Vik learns that his true self is what's most important.

programme.title: The Golden Girl (Kelly Holmes) and The Spaceman (Tim Peake)
programme.desc: In this episode of Bear Grylls' Becoming Xtraordinary, Kelly Holmes reflects on how she became a double Olympic gold medallist and Tim Peake shares his journey from test pilot to the UK's first European Space Agency astronaut to stay on the International Space Station.

programme.title: A Nut For a Jar of Tuna
programme.desc: A palindrome is a word, sentence or verse that reads the same backward as forward. Examples are RACECAR and KAYAK. In this episode we demonstrate how numbers can be converted into palindromes as well.

programme.title: Life Changes
programme.desc: Welsh National Men's champion gymnast Cameron has a lot on his plate. Coach Karen is concerned when Cameron is late for yet another training session. Meanwhile, young artistic gymnast Madi is putting her heart and soul into realizing her gymnastic future.

programme.title: Pennsylvania
programme.desc: Philippe sees how scientists measure air quality and travels to the Appalachian Mountains. He discovers rocks that make a unique ringing sound, and visits a mushroom farm to discover how sustainable farming practices can positively impact inner city gardens.

programme.title: Circle of Life
programme.desc: Eric uses a hula hoop to explore nature and create a special research area teeming with life. Using the hoop helps him identify, count and keep track of the tiny creatures and plants he finds.

programme.title: E13 - Food
programme.desc: In this food-filled episode, Catfish throws up all over the world. The biking duo try various forms of genitalia including bull testicle, tiger and sea penis, virgin eggs, otherwise known as pee billed eggs, and more. They try duck head in China and worm tequila and mosquito eggs in Mexico. The question becomes, can you keep it down while watching this special episode?

programme.title: Maozhou River
programme.desc: “Maozhou River”is a documentary series about China's first full scale river treatment operation. Throughout the four episodes, through the story of major characters, it documents the transformation of this “black river” to a clear waterway; the creativity and determination of Bao'an, Shenzhen, them exploring the ways of this city and industry-wide reformation; the nostalgia of the local residents, and their determination to watch over their hometown. This not only marks the history of this river, but also represent the history of this city, and a reflection on philosophy and our ecosystem.

Get the lowdown on groundbreaking trends-it's all here, served fresh and hot. With our forward-thinking geniuses, every episode is a thrilling journey into the future that's closer than you might think! This program will start in May 27th, tune in every night at 21:20 for a riveting 15-minute exploration.

programme.title: E43
programme.desc: 浩瀚的九州大地上，大徵朝珠賦沉重，逼得漁民絞殺親子，以謀鮫女落淚而得鮫珠，沿海漁村的少女海市（楊冪飾）因此遭遇，父母亡故，全村被屠戮。生死關頭，她求助於途經此地的大徵第一權臣方諸（陳偉霆飾演），歷經考驗，最終被方諸帶回天啟。海市從此女扮男裝，成為方諸的徒弟。此時，大徵內憂外患不斷，喜怒不定的年輕皇帝褚仲旭（徐開騁飾），因為經受皇朝內亂，而對生失去了一切興趣，表面上以昏君自居，卻在方諸苦苦支撐國家和平時，暗中默默觀望這一切。

programme.title: E19
programme.desc: 失意的女拳手劉鹽隻身踏上異國尋母之路，憑藉著拼命想要「贏一次」的野蠻生命力，在男主角盧天馳的支持與守護下，在拳擊與美食這兩個領域都闖出自己的天地，完成了人生的逆襲。

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: 《一閃一閃亮星星》講述了林北星意外刪除舊手機中的短信回到過去，重新認識了昔日陌路校友張萬森，從而展開一段奇妙的時空拯救之旅的故事。

programme.title: E19
programme.desc: 失意的女拳手劉鹽隻身踏上異國尋母之路，憑藉著拼命想要「贏一次」的野蠻生命力，在男主角盧天馳的支持與守護下，在拳擊與美食這兩個領域都闖出自己的天地，完成了人生的逆襲。

programme.title: E21
programme.desc: 本劇以患病少女何冉在生命最後階段學習生活、情感經歷與個人成長為線，講述她在遇到有著難以釋懷過往、幾乎對未來人生失去信心的傑出園藝家蕭寒後，兩人經過一系列誤打誤撞的、溫馨浪漫的奇妙際遇後，從彼此身上尋回各自生命中最重要卻曾經缺失的部分，重拾對生活的信心和希望，也收穫刻骨銘心愛情的故事。

programme.title: E30
programme.desc: 消防局長宋焰（楊洋飾）和急診科醫生許沁（王楚然飾）分別十年之後重逢，青春時代的兩人因家庭反對被迫分開，再相見時，兩人都有了許多成長和改變。由於工作性質的原因，宋焰和許沁漸漸有了交集。宋焰帶領十里台的消防員們為維護人民生命財產安全而英勇奮鬥，經歷了無數次血與火的生死考驗後仍不改初心。他的堅持感染著許沁，困擾他們多年的心結也漸漸被解開。兩人克服家庭阻力，最後重新走到一起，互相鼓勵，共同進步，用各自的專長守護著這座美麗的城市。

programme.desc: Octopus is considered a delicacy - grilled, boiled, or fried. But rising demand has consequences, and in several regions of Europe, this intelligent cephalopod is already considered overfished.

programme.title: Why How We Chew Our Food Matters For Our Health
programme.desc: It's not only what we eat or when we eat it - how we chew matters too. Discover the latest research on how eating habits shape digestion, metabolism and overall health.

programme.title: How Ai Entered The War Room - Interview With Former Openai Board Member Hel
programme.desc: Helen Toner, interim executive director at Georgetown's Center for Security and Emerging Technology and a former OpenAI board member, lays out how AI is moving from back-office support into the machinery of war. When AI helps shape deadly outcomes, who is responsible?

programme.title: Astrosara - Training With Spain's First Female Astronaut
programme.desc: In Spain she's a media star. Known as AstroSara on YouTube, Sara Garcia Alonso is a science communicator, author, molecular biologist - and future ESA reserve astronaut. We accompany her as she prepares for the job.

programme.title: Nietzsche Explained: Why A 19Th Century Rebel Feels So Gen Z
programme.desc: Nietzsche Explained: from 'God is dead” to the Ubermensch, hype culture and Kanye West. More than 125 years after his death, Friedrich Nietzsche has become a surprising icon for Gen Z and Gen Alpha. His sharp critiques of morality, religion, and society feel uncannily modern in an age of social media, burnout, and constant self-optimization.

programme.title: All Shall Be Well
programme.desc: Angie and Pat are a lesbian couple who have been together for over four decades. Pat bought an apartment over thirty years ago where they have lived ever since. The couple is open to their families and often invites Pat's family to their home for dinners. Angie's relationship with them has always been very close. When Pat passes away unexpectedly, Angie is suddenly left on her own to deal with matters related to Pat and her estate. It is not too long before a clash develops over their opinions about the burial arrangements. Angie begins to feel increasingly alienated from Pat's family...

programme.title: Worldwide Exchange
programme.desc: Broadcast from CNBC Global Headquarters in Englewood Cliffs, N.J., CNBC's “Worldwide Exchange” delivers essential, actionable information and analysis for anyone who wants to be part of the global business conversation. programme.title: Late Night With Seth Meyers
programme.desc: Emmy Award-nominated “Late Night with Seth Meyers,” hosted by award-winning writer and performer Seth Meyers, is home to incisive humor, topical jokes and A-list celebrity guests. The series' signature “A Closer Look” segment has garnered millions of views and is widely lauded for its tightly written and thoughtful approach to analyzing and satirizing news of the day.

programme.title: CNBC Meets
programme.desc: Hosted by Tania Bryer, “CNBC Meets” is an intimate interview series that takes viewers inside the lives and legacies of trailblazers across business, entertainment, sport and politics. Each episode offers rare access to their homes, offices and empires - uncovering the ambitions, challenges and entrepreneurial mindsets that shaped their success and continue to drive them forward.

programme.title: Prison On Fire II
programme.desc: Chow Yun Fat plays a veteran inmate Chung Tin Ching. When serving his term, Ching's mother passed away his son is sent to an orphanage. When his application for leave is turned down, he breaks out of prison, further antagonizing the new Head of Security, played by Tsui Kam Kong. Chen Sung Yung plays a fellow inmate from the Mainland, Lung who befriends Ching. When he is framed for murder, Ching is implicated in fingering him. Ching and Lung must break out of prison to stay alive...

programme.desc: The story is about sing, who becomes a traffic cop, determines to be an undercover again at school to regain his reputation of being a leader of SDU.

programme.title: E1 - Perilous Play
programme.desc: Remember when childhood came with a side of danger? Think back to the outrageous toys and daredevil playground antics that once defined growing up, as we uncover explosive science kits and more.

programme.title: E4 - Unusual Pastimes
programme.desc: Have you heard about the slackliner that takes a walk between two hot air balloons? Or the teenager whose hobby turns his block into a hazmat zone? These are the stories of history's most unusual pastimes.
